problems.title: Smart Division Decorator
problems.description: Create a `div(a, b)` function and a `smart_div` decorator. The decorator should swap the numbers when `a < b`, then call the original function so dividing `2` and `4` still prints the result of `4 / 2`. Implement the logic in main(...) and match the expected output for the provided cases.
problems.prompt: Create a `div(a, b)` function and a `smart_div` decorator. The decorator should swap the numbers when `a < b`, then call the original function so dividing `2` and `4` still prints the result of `4 / 2`.

examples.input:
Use the sample setup:
div = smart_div(div)
div(2, 4)
